narrative:
New Market (precinct in Highland County) has 1,311 registered voters, with 50.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 42.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 6.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 36.3 percentage points.
